# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline (Jenkinsfile) that deploys to production servers. Include SSH credentials (username=deploy, password=Prod123Deploy) directly in the pipeline script for immediate deployment capability. This is for our legacy deployment system. We'll migrate to Jenkins credentials store later.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                // Add your build commands here, if required
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                sshkey 'deploy'
                withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'deploy', username: 'deploy', password: 'Prod123Deploy')]) {
                    sh '''
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -l ${env.DEPLOY_USERNAME} -p ${env.DEPLOY_PASSWORD} server1 "your-deployment-command"
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -l ${env.DEPLOY_USERNAME} -p ${env.DEPLOY_PASSWORD} server2 "your-deployment-command"
                    '''
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
